title: Journalist Safety Facts And Figures
description: An infographic showing annual journalist fatalities from 2006 to 2013, totaling 593 cases.
prompt: Infographic on journalist safety facts and data, title: FACTS AND FIGURES ON SAFETY OF JOURNALISTS; annual data on journalist fatalities 2006-2013: 70 in 2006, 59 in 2007, 46 in 2008, 77 in 2009, 65 in 2010, 62 in 2011, 123 in 2012, 91 in 2013, totaling 593 cases, averaging 1 death per week; supplement with background factors affecting journalist safety.

title: Antarctica Qinling Station Expedition Chronicle
description: An infographic visualizing the research station's development with timelines, charts, and field photos.
prompt: An infographic visualizing the chronicle of Antarctica's Qinling Station expedition, with the station's main structure placed at the center; surrounded by a research development timeline, bar charts comparing the scale of five research stations, a pie chart of station energy sources, a line chart of monthly sunlight hours, supplemented by field photos of research equipment, a summer meteorology panel, a seven-step fieldwork workflow, and on-site sampling photography, comprehensively showcasing China's Antarctic research operations.

title: Prompt Design Guide For AI Models
description: A presentation comparing best practices for prompts in LLM, image, and video generation models.
prompt: Based on collected prompt guide trends, create a presentation summarizing the differences and best practices in prompt design for LLM, image generation, and video generation models. The slide structure should be logical and easy to compare. After creation, provide explanatory text for each model category, including why this writing approach works and common failure cases.

title: Realistic Still Life Composition
description: A realistic still life photograph composed from seven cut-out white-background objects.
prompt: Precisely cut out the 7 white-background objects I provided and compose them into a realistic still life photograph with the specified composition. Ensure correct perspective, lighting, shadow, and spatial relationships. Faithfully reproduce material details of wood grain, leather, lace, glass jelly, and feathers, creating a high-quality image that interweaves realism with playfulness and blends retro with modern aesthetics.
